senses.definition: the event or process of a baby being born

examples.x: The birth of their first child brought immense joy to the whole family.
The midwife stayed by her side throughout the entire birth process.
They celebrated the baby's birth with a small gathering of close friends and family.
The hospital recorded the exact time and weight of the birth.
Witnessing the birth of a new life was a profoundly moving experience for everyone present.

senses.definition: a ceremony during which students receive their degrees

examples.x: Graduation day is a time for students to express gratitude to their professors, mentors, and loved ones who supported them throughout their academic journey.
The caps soared through the air as graduates cheered and celebrated their graduation.
The graduation ceremony concluded with the traditional singing of the alma mater, fostering a sense of unity and pride among graduates and attendees alike.

senses.definition: an agreement between two people to get married or the duration of this agreement

examples.x: They announced their engagement at a family gathering.
She wore the ring to symbolize their engagement.
Their engagement lasted for two years before they got married.
The couple celebrated their engagement with a dinner party.
They decided to delay the engagement party until after the holidays.

senses.definition: the day on which fathers are appreciated and often receive gifts from their children
the day that comes first in the calendar year and is a public holiday in most countries
the day on which mothers are appreciated and often receive gifts from their children
a day on which two people celebrate their love toward each other and often buy gifts for one another
October 31st, a holiday where people dress in costumes, carve pumpkins, and children go door-to-door asking for candy

examples.x: The kids dressed as ghosts and witches for Halloween this year.
She made a spooky cake for the Halloween party.
They decorated their house with spiderwebs and pumpkins for Halloween.
On Halloween, children went trick-or-treating around the neighborhood.
Her favorite holiday is Halloween because she loves scary stories.

senses.definition: something special, important, and known that takes place at a particular time or place such as a festival or Valentin's Day

examples.x: The annual charity event raised thousands of dollars for the local community center.
Valentine's Day is a global event celebrated with love, gifts, and special gestures.
The wedding was the most memorable event of the year, bringing together friends and family from all over the world.
The opening ceremony of the Olympic Games is always a spectacular event, showcasing diverse cultures.
The music festival is an event that attracts thousands of fans every summer to enjoy live performances.

senses.definition: an official or special ceremony or event

examples.x: The graduation ceremony was a momentous occasion for all the students.
They dressed in their finest attire for the formal occasion.
The anniversary party was a joyous occasion, with music, dancing, and laughter.
We gathered for a solemn occasion to pay our respects at the memorial service.
Their wedding day was a beautiful and memorable occasion filled with love and happiness.

senses.definition: a meeting, especially one with a particular purpose
to hold or organize an event such as a party

examples.x: She threw a birthday party for her best friend at a local restaurant.
They decided to throw a housewarming party to celebrate their new home.
He threw an elaborate dinner party to celebrate his promotion.
We're planning to throw a surprise party for our parents' anniversary.

senses.definition: a gathering or event where people come together to honor someone or something, often with food, music, and dancing

examples.x: The whole town came together for a grand celebration in honor of their mayor's reelection.
Families gathered in the park for a picnic celebration, complete with games and laughter.
The wedding celebration lasted well into the night, with guests dancing under the twinkling lights.
After months of hard work, the team enjoyed a well-deserved celebration at their favorite restaurant.
The annual festival is a celebration of local culture, featuring traditional music, dance, and cuisine.

senses.definition: to amuse someone so that they have an enjoyable time

examples.x: The clown entertained the children at the birthday party with magic tricks and balloon animals.
The comedian entertained the audience with jokes and witty anecdotes.
They entertained guests at the dinner party with live music and dancing.
The band will entertain the crowd with their upbeat music.
The magician is entertaining the children with his magic tricks.

senses.definition: a long piece of cloth with a design or message, which is hung in public places, typically used to represent something at events

examples.x: The school hung a banner in the gym to celebrate the championship win.
During the protest, activists marched with banners calling for change.
The company placed a banner outside the store to advertise its sale.
At the birthday party, colorful banners adorned the walls, adding to the festive atmosphere.
The stadium was adorned with banners of the competing teams for the championship game.

senses.definition: to put out a flame, candle, etc. using the air in one's lungs
a block or stick of wax with a string inside that can be lit to produce light

examples.x: As part of the ceremony, they each lit a candle to symbolize unity and hope.
The flickering candle cast dancing shadows on the wall as they enjoyed a romantic dinner.
The sweet aroma of vanilla filled the air as the candle burned slowly on the coffee table.
The power outage forced us to rely on candles for illumination during the storm.

senses.definition: something given to someone as a sign of appreciation or on a special occasion

examples.x: The book you gave me for Christmas was the perfect present; I've been enjoying it immensely.
He always brings thoughtful presents whenever he visits, which shows how much he values our friendship.
The children were thrilled with their presents from Santa Claus on Christmas morning.
As a token of gratitude, she gave her teacher a handmade card as a present at the end of the school year.

senses.definition: to cover an object in paper, soft fabric, etc.

examples.x: She decided to wrap the birthday gift in colorful wrapping paper and tie it with a ribbon.
Before mailing the fragile item, the sender carefully wrapped it in bubble wrap for protection.
The florist expertly wrapped the bouquet in decorative paper and secured it with a bow.
To surprise her, he wrapped the new book in elegant wrapping paper and hid it on the bookshelf.
During the holidays, families often gather to wrap presents and share the joy of gift-giving.

senses.definition: to come together in a place, typically for a specific purpose or activity

examples.x: Every Sunday, the family gathers for a meal at Grandma's house.
As the evening progresses, friends gather at the local cafe for coffee.
After the game, fans gather outside the stadium to meet the players.
The community gathers at the park to enjoy live music on summer evenings.

senses.definition: to join in an event, activity, etc.

examples.x: She decided to participate in the charity run to support a good cause.
Students are encouraged to participate in extracurricular activities for a well-rounded education.
We invite everyone to participate in the upcoming community clean-up event.
The team participated in the competition and achieved great success.
He consistently participates in charity events to support various causes.

senses.definition: to participate in something, such as an event or activity

examples.x: He was excited to take part in the debate competition and showcase his public speaking skills.
She decided to take part in the charity run to raise money for a good cause.
Students are encouraged to take part in extracurricular activities to enrich their school experience.
Even though she wasn't feeling her best, she still managed to take part.
The team was thrilled to take part, despite the challenging competition.

senses.definition: to be the organizer of an event such as a meeting, party, etc. to which people are invited

examples.x: Companies often host conferences to bring industry professionals together for networking.
Friends may host a dinner party to celebrate special occasions with loved ones.
Schools regularly host events to engage parents and showcase students' achievements.
Event planners have recently hosted successful conferences.
Families hosted a neighborhood block party.
